nasb.text: Then the mystery was revealed to Daniel in a night vision. Then Daniel blessed the God of heaven;

esv.text: Then the mystery was revealed to Daniel in a vision of the night. Then Daniel blessed the God of heaven.

cnv.text: 於是這隱祕的事在夜間的異象中給但以理顯明了。但以理就稱頌天上的　神。

ccb.text: 这奥秘在夜间的异象中向但以理显明，他便颂赞天上的上帝，
